achievements.title: Tech Hunt – 1st Prize
achievements.description: Secured 1st Place in the Tech Hunt competition at college technical fest
achievements.details: Won 1st Place by solving technical challenges, programming tasks, and problem-solving rounds.

achievements.title: Gen AI Hackathon – 2nd Prize
achievements.description: Awarded 2nd Place for developing AutoSage - a Generative AI-based solution at NASSCOM
achievements.details: Developed AutoSage, an AI-powered solution for vehicle comparison. Competed among 83 teams and secured 2nd Prize in the NASSCOM Gen AI Hackathon.

achievements.title: NASA Space Apps Challenge
achievements.description: Participated in the global NASA Space Apps Challenge competition
achievements.details: Collaborated in developing an educational platform showcasing the capabilities of the James Webb Space Telescope through interactive learning experiences and games.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH)
achievements.description: Participated in Smart India Hackathon - India's largest innovation competition
achievements.details: Worked on solving real-world problem statements through technology-driven solutions and collaborative development. Gained experience in building scalable solutions for national challenges.

achievements.title: AI with LLM - HCLTech
achievements.description: Ongoing comprehensive training on AI and Large Language Models by HCLTech
achievements.details: Currently pursuing training to master Large Language Models (LLMs). Completed modules on ML, NLP, Deep Learning.
